candidates.why: Represents total operating revenues; identical amounts to Total Revenue and appears to be the primary revenue line.
Explicit total revenue label with same values as Total operating revenues; included as alternate in case of label changes over time.
Operating profit, not top-line revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Pre-tax profit, not revenue.

variables.notes: Both revenue lines carry identical values; using Total Revenue as primary and Total operating revenues as fallback for potential label changes.

candidates.why: Direct operating costs of rigs; this is the best proxy for cost of goods sold / cost of services.
Overhead SG&A, not direct production costs.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Asset, not an expense line, so not COGS.
Includes multiple components and is effectively a subtotal; COGS should be a component, not a total.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Tax expense, not COGS.

variables.notes: Rig operating expenses represent the direct costs of providing drilling services and are the closest match to COGS.

candidates.why: Represents direct operating costs (COGS), not SG&A overhead, so should be excluded from SG&A components.
Classical SG&A overhead line; matches selling/general/administrative concept and should be included as SG&A component.
Income line, not an expense; does not belong in SG&A components.

variables.notes: General and administrative expenses is the clear SG&A overhead line; other candidates are either COGS or income, so excluded.
No line item related to research and development appears in the provided Income Statement; R&D is treated as zero.

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense on the income statement; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Accrued interest on senior secured notes
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrual, not period expense; not suitable as XINT.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not the desired cost measure.

variables.notes: Interest expense is the dedicated income-statement line for financing costs and is used as the sole XINT source; other items are accruals or income.

candidates.why: Investment asset, not equity capital; incorrect for book equity.
Represents shareholders’ equity; appropriate for BE, and there is no separate non-controlling interest line to exclude.
Total equity equals shareholders equity here and includes no separate minority interest; could be used but shareholders equity is more specific.
Balance sheet total, not just equity; not appropriate for BE.

variables.notes: Shareholders equity is used as book equity; there is no separate non-controlling interest line, so this represents total equity attributable to owners.
No line corresponding to non-controlling interests or minority interest is present in the Balance Sheet; MIB is set to zero.
